get.summary: Memberships points daily Rewards status retrieve.

AuthToken.description: SDKWork auth token carried as Authorization: Bearer <auth_token>.

SdkWorkApiResponse.description: Canonical SDKWork success envelope. See API_SPEC.md §15. Success code MUST be 0.

code.description: Numeric success result code. MUST be 0 on HTTP 2xx.

data.description: Operation-specific payload. Typed per operation via allOf with SdkWorkResourceData / SdkWorkPageData / SdkWorkCommandData.

traceId.description: Server-owned request correlation id. Clients MUST NOT supply this value.

item.description: Typed domain resource for the operation.

PageInfo.description: Pagination metadata. `mode` is `offset` or `cursor`. See API_SPEC.md §14.2.

ProblemDetail.description: RFC 9457 problem detail. See API_SPEC.md §16. `code` is the numeric platform error code (40001–79999).

instance.description: Request endpoint occurrence in the form `{METHOD} {routeTemplate}`.

operationId.description: OpenAPI operation id for the failing request when resolved by the web framework.

code.description: Numeric error result code. MUST be non-zero. See API_SPEC.md §15.3.

traceId.description: Server-owned request correlation id. Same semantics as SdkWorkApiResponse.traceId.

FieldError.description: Field-level validation error attached to a ProblemDetail.
